nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cobham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of at least three places in southern England called Cobham, in Kent, Surrey, and Sussex.

nameMeanings.name: Joanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joann
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

en.lifeSummary: Joanne de Cobham was born in 1334, in Roxburghshire, Scotland as the daughter of Reginald de Cobham. She had at least 1 son with Sir Patrick Gray Laird of Broxmouth. She died in 1371, at the age of 37.

ja.lifeSummary: Joanne de Cobhamは1334年にスコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアでReginald de Cobhamの娘として生まれた。彼女はSir Patrick Gray Laird of Broxmouthとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1371年に37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joanne de Cobham(은)는 1334년 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르에서 Reginald de Cobham의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Sir Patrick Gray Laird of Broxmouth(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1371년 37세의 나이로 사망했다.
